scripts.build: mkdir -p dist/assets && cp index.html learn.html sectors.html dictionary.html tools.html news.html styles.css script.js robots.txt sitemap.xml _headers _redirects dist/ && cp assets/favicon.svg assets/market-desk.jpg dist/assets/
scripts.dev:cf: npm run build && npx wrangler pages dev dist --port 8788 --compatibility-date=2026-05-18
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name market-baihua
